_comment: Cross-SDK enforcement-mode + payload-shape parity vectors for AAASM-3158 (AC4).
The Agent Assembly enforcement-mode constant is a shared contract: every SDK must
expose the SAME ordered set of modes. Node ships ENFORCEMENT_MODES as a readonly
array (see tests/public/test_node_sdk.py); Python and Go expose the equivalent set.
The 'canonical' list is the source of truth; 'sdk_exposed' records how each SDK
names/exposes it so the offline parity test can assert all three agree without a
live SDK install. The live cross-SDK comparison (actually importing each SDK) is
skip-guarded because it needs the published SDKs / runtimes installed.
